aged-care-in-hospital.name: Elderly stuck in hospital beds
aged-care-in-hospital.description: Bevan's running record of pressing the Government on older Western Australians left in hospital beds because there are not enough residential aged-care beds for them to move to.

regional-aged-care.name: The regional aged care gap
regional-aged-care.description: Older Western Australians in the regions who cannot get aged care where they live: home care, workforce, assessments and services funded for the city first.

forestry.name: Forestry and the timber transition
forestry.description: The scrutiny of the native forest transition and what it is doing to timber towns, plantation supply, sandalwood, and the workers and shires left behind.

mrshs.name: Margaret River Senior High School
mrshs.description: The push for Stage 2 at a school built for 650, now teaching more than 1,200, and still waiting on the build.

mr-hospital.name: Margaret River Hospital
mr-hospital.description: The push to release the business case and fund the upgrade of a hospital serving a fast-growing, ageing tourism region.

firearms-regulations.name: Firearms Regulations 2024
firearms-regulations.description: Bevan's case that the 2024 firearms rules are unworkable for the regional people who rely on firearms as everyday tools for farming, animal welfare and pest control.

ct-scanner.name: CT scanner at Manjimup Hospital
ct-scanner.description: Bevan's push for a CT scanner at Manjimup Hospital, so people in the southern forests are not sent hours down the road for a scan the region should be able to do close to home.
